title: ferray-ma: no shared mask support (NumPy's sharedmask property)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's MaskedArray can share its mask with views — modifying the mask of a view modifies the parent's mask too (when sharedmask=True). This is analogous to array views sharing data. ferray-ma always clones the mask (it's a separate Array<bool, D>). Shared masks reduce memory for large arrays and enable in-place mask operations through views. Low priority since it requires significant architecture changes.
